title: Silent Horizon
description: A calm study of light moving across a distant shoreline, balancing soft atmosphere with crisp geometric bands.

title: Blue Figure
description: A quiet portrait shaped by layered blues, warm highlights, and a direct gaze that holds the room.

title: Inner Architecture
description: Interlocking forms and saturated color fields create the feeling of a city remembered through motion.

title: Echoes of Time
description: Layered marks and smoky contrast create a reflective meditation on memory and movement.

title: Fragments
description: Soft architectural blocks drift through a restrained field of color and shadow.

title: Mountain Light
description: A luminous valley scene built from soft brushwork, cool mist, and quiet depth.

title: Garden Current
description: A vivid nature study with layered color, organic rhythm, and a fresh sense of movement.

title: Quiet Shape
description: A restrained composition focused on balance, negative space, and delicate tonal shifts.

title: Desert Echo
description: A dynamic composition of layered textures and earthy tones evoking the vastness of the desert.
